heading: Smithsonian Institution: report
label: 1341 Smithsonian Institution: report
text: In addition to the usual number of the report of the Smithsonian Institution ten thousand copies shall be printed: one thousand for the Senate, two thousand for the House of Representatives, five thousand for distribution by the Smithsonian Institution, and two thousand for distribution by the National Museum.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 289 (, ).Jan. 12, 1895, ch. 23, § 7328 Stat. 616
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 289 (, ).Jan. 12, 1895, ch. 23, § 7328 Stat. 616
